---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload image / allow camera access
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. **Do not upload photos of real faces** — screenshots of the UI or error states are sufficient.

## Environment

| Field    | Value |
|----------|-------|
| OS       | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17 |
| Browser  | e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121 |
| Device   | e.g. iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24, Desktop |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. network conditions, file format of the uploaded image, console errors).
